HomePage.heroTitle: Shared trip plans people actually want to follow.
HomePage.heroDescription: Discover popular itineraries, save ideas from other travelers, and keep your own plans ready to share with friends in one place.
HomePage.whatWeDoDescription: Organize routes, budgets, notes, and stay details in one shared trip flow.
HomePage.communityDescription: Browse trips other people love and reuse the structure for your next group plan.
HomePage.shareDescription: Turn your itinerary into something your friends or other travelers can follow.
HomePage.statsDescription: saved trip ideas, route drafts, and community favorites ready to explore.
HomePage.suggestDescription: Browse sample trip cards from travelers whose plans get saved and liked the most.
HomePage.joinEyebrow: Join us to share your trip
HomePage.joinTitle: Sign in and start sharing your own itinerary
HomePage.joinDescription: Keep your trip private while drafting, then publish it when it is ready for your group or the community.
HomePage.loginDescription: Access trip plans, invite links, and your shared itinerary dashboard.

MyTrip.title: Plan a trip your group can actually follow
MyTrip.description: Draft the schedule, estimate budget, and keep your travel checklist in one shared workspace.
MyTrip.tripOverviewDescription: Set the essentials before you start adding stops.
MyTrip.notesPlaceholder: What kind of trip are you planning?
MyTrip.itineraryDescription: Add each stop with time, date, and a short note.
MyTrip.stopNotePlaceholder: Meeting point, booking ref, or reminder
MyTrip.noStops: No stops yet. Add the first stop for this trip.
MyTrip.checklistDescription: Track prep tasks before the trip starts.
MyTrip.defaultNotes: Easy pace, good food, and enough room for flexible plans.
MyTrip.sampleStopOneNote: Drop bags at the hotel before heading out.
MyTrip.sampleStopTwoNote: Leave early for better light and fewer crowds.
